Task description explicitly provides "Corporate Revenue" as the name
Task description explicitly provides "Consumer Revenue" as the name
While the task description explicitly instructs using "Revenue", independent analysis of the dataset shows the column is actually named "Sales" and there is no "Revenue" column.

pi_items.metadata_value: Corporate vs Consumer Revenue by Product Category
pi_items.verified_value: Corporate vs Consumer Revenue by Product Category
pi_items.source: Task description instruction 5 specifies this exact title.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an Oracle Analytics workbook using the synthetic "Sample Order Lines" dataset. The agent must create calculated measures ("Corporate Revenue" and "Consumer Revenue") with a CASE WHEN logic using "Customer Segment". Note: the prompt explicitly asks to use a "Revenue" column, but the dataset only has a "Sales" column. The measures are then plotted as a grouped bar chart by "Product Category" with a specific title, and saved to "C:\Users\Docker\Documents\segment_comparison.dva".
